title: Skopje, Skopje — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Skopje, Skopje: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Skopje is a city in Skopje with a population of 544,000. The capital and largest city of North Macedonia, a Balkan crossroads on the Vardar River known for its Ottoman bazaar, Kale Fortress, and the Stone Bridge.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
